query: DRC Ebola Bundibugyo Ituri outbreak May 2026 latest case count spread
answer:
Based on my thorough research attempts, I was unable to access live web data due to all search and fetch tools being unavailable in this environment. Here is my complete synthesis:

---

## DRC Ebola Bundibugyo Ituri Outbreak — May 2026 Research Findings

### Data Availability

**No current data could be retrieved.** All web search, web fetch, and tool search capabilities were unavailable during this research session. The most recent cached WHO Disease Outbreak News data (through early April 2026) contains **no reference to an Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in Ituri province**.

### Background Context

- **Ebola Bundibugyo virus (BDBV)** has caused only two known prior outbreaks: Bundibugyo, Uganda (2007; ~149 cases, ~37 deaths) and Isiro, DRC (2012; ~57 cases, ~29 deaths).
- **Ituri province** was previously affected during the 2018–2020 Ebola Zaire outbreak (North Kivu/Ituri; ~3,481 cases, ~2,299 deaths) — a different Ebola species.
- The most recent DRC Ebola event in cached WHO data is the **September 2025 EVD outbreak in Kasai Province** (Bulape Health Zone): 64 cases (53 confirmed, 11 probable), 45 deaths (CFR ~70.3%), which was winding down by late 2025.

### Limitations

If a new Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak was declared in Ituri in May 2026, it postdates all available cached data and my training cutoff. I cannot confirm or deny its existence, nor provide case counts.

key_facts: No Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in Ituri province, DRC was found in any accessible data source through early April 2026.
All web search and web fetch tools were unavailable during this research session, severely limiting data retrieval.
Ebola Bundibugyo virus (BDBV) has historically caused only two known outbreaks: Bundibugyo, Uganda (2007, ~149 cases, ~37 deaths) and Isiro, DRC (2012, ~57 cases, ~29 deaths).
Ituri province was previously affected by the 2018-2020 Ebola Zaire outbreak (not Bundibugyo), with approximately 3,481 cases and 2,299 deaths across North Kivu and Ituri.
The most recent DRC Ebola event in cached WHO data is the September 2025 EVD outbreak in Kasai Province (Bulape Health Zone): 64 cases, 45 deaths (CFR ~70.3%), winding down by late 2025.
If a May 2026 Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in Ituri exists, it postdates all available data sources and could not be confirmed or quantified.
